slogan.text: Every civilized person in this world has two homelands: their own and Syria

security_personnel_verification.title: Security Personnel Verification
security_personnel_verification.description: Each member of the public security forces will receive an ID with a QR code to prove his identity and powers when needed.

polls.title: Polls
polls.description: A platform for conducting polls and surveys to gauge public opinion on various issues.

violations.title: Violations
violations.description: A community-driven board for reporting and documenting violations against Syrian citizens.

hero.title: Let us be the change we want to see
hero.description: We invite you to explore our initiatives and join us in making a difference if they resonate with you.

about.title: About me
about.description: I’m Feras, a Syrian citizen with hope for a brighter future for the new Syria. I’ve been a software engineer since 2010. Despite having a full-time job, pursuing an MSc in Data Science, and having other commitments, I dedicate my spare moments to coding for the Syrian community 💚. If you believe my work is valuable and impactful, your support would allow me to invest more time in creating and enhancing features.
about.esyrians: I have got the domain e-syrians.com for another idea which is different than what I have listed recently. Maybe I will work on it soon.

donate.title: Support E-Syrians
donate.subtitle: E-Syrians is a community-driven platform. Donations help sustain and improve the platform but do not grant any influence over its policies or decisions.

census.title: Syrian National Census
census.description: This initiative enables Syrians to register their data themselves. The goal is to create a safe, fast and efficient way to save ourselves and our country a lot of time and money, and to reach our citizens in areas outside government control.

peronalData.title: Personal data
peronalData.description: Here, you can enter your basic information, which will be used for verification and statistics. Please ensure accuracy, as updating this information will require you to go through the verification process again.

locationData.description: Wherever you are, please fill your location data. You cannot update this data more than once in a month

censusData.title: National census data
censusData.description: This platform is not affiliated with or supported by the Syrian government at this time. Therefore, all fields related to personal civilian data are optional. However, if you choose to provide them, rest assured that your information will be stored securely and handled with the utmost confidentiality.

We assure you that they are real people—you can visit their profiles and check their social media links for verification.

To maintain trust and accuracy in the system, any account proven to be fake will be suspended along with its verifiers. Our commitment is to ensure a reliable and transparent registration process for everyone.

emailVerification.error: We could not verify your email address 😔, please log in and request another link from your account

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro: At e-syrians, we prioritize your privacy and are dedicated to safeguarding your personal data.

dataCollection.title: Data Collection
dataCollection.description: We gather the following types of information

item1.title: Personal Information: This includes the personal details you provide during registration.

item2.title: Activity Log: As you use our website, we collect information to help us evaluate user experience, enhance website security, and protect your account. We track all activities performed by users on the site, such as creating, modifying, or updating resources. For each action, we store details such as the time, device, and IP address from which the request originated. This also includes failed attempts, which assist us in identifying potential user difficulties or detecting fraudulent activity.

dataUsage.title: Data Usage
dataUsage.description: The information you provide is used to:

item1.title: To provide and maintain our services

item2.title: To process your requests, from account creation to participating in polls and other services provided by us.

item3.title: To communicate with you regarding your account or other matters related to our services

item4.title: To improve and personalize your experience on the site

item5.title: To analyze usage trends and website performance

item6.title: To comply with legal obligations or enforce our terms of service

dataSharing.title: Data Sharing
dataSharing.description: We will not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. However, we may share some of your information in the following cases:

item1.title: With service providers that help us operate our website, conduct business, or provide services to you (e.g., payment processors, hosting providers).

item2.title: For legal reasons, if we are required to do so by law, to protect our rights, or to comply with legal obligations.

item3.title: Platform-related data sharing: This includes sharing polls you participated in, the answers you provided, and your basic information if you have been identified as a fraudulent user.

dataProtection.title: Data Protection
dataProtection.description: We promise implementing appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect the  information we collect. However, please note that no method of transmission over the internet or method of electronic storage is 100% secure. Your sensitive data like national id, password and detailed address are encrypted and never stored as plain text anywhere.

item1.title: The right to access and request a copy of your personal data

item2.title: The right to rectify any incorrect or incomplete information

item3.title: The right to request deletion of your personal data, subject to certain exceptions

item4.title: The right to object to or restrict the processing of your personal data

dataProtectionRight.title: Data Protection Right
dataProtectionRight.description: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Please feel free to contact the platform admin on info@e-syrians.com.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.intro: By using this service, you agree to the following terms and conditions:

purpose.title: Purpose
purpose.description: e-syrians is designed to provide a digital space for discussions, information sharing, and community engagement. Our platform enables users to:

item1.title: Participate in polls and discussions on various topics.

item2.title: Share opinions and engage in constructive debates.

item1.title: You must be at least 13 years old to use e-syrians.

item2.title: You agree to provide accurate information when registering and keep your account secure.

item1.title: Use the platform for any illegal activities.

item2.title: Violate the privacy of other users.

item3.title: Attempt to disrupt the platform’s functionality through hacking, automated scripts, data scraping or similar actions.

dataUsage.title: Data usage
dataUsage.description: Your data is collected and processed in accordance with our <privacy>privacy policy</privacy>

item1.title: Any damages caused by the use of this platform.

item2.title: Unauthorized use of the platform due to your negligence.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Please feel free to contact the platform admin on info@e-syrians.com.

q1.title: What is this platform about?
q1.description: This platform is designed to foster trust by verifying users through a community-based system. It allows people to create profiles, verify each other, and participate in polls and national census.

q2.title: How does it work?
q2.description: Users create a profile, get verified by people they know, and engage with the platform through creating and answering polls.

q3.title: Who can use this platform?
q3.description: The platform is for Syrian people only. This is the only condition we have

q4.title: Is there a mobile app available?

q5.title: How can I contact support?
q5.description: You can reach our support team via info@e-syrians.com

q6.title: Who is behind the e-syrians platform?
q6.description: Feras Jobeir is the sole individual behind e-syrians. He conceived the idea, developed the platform, and is responsible for its ongoing maintenance. He also manages the servers, subscriptions, and all associated costs. His mission is to build a trusted platform for Syrians, focusing on community engagement and identity verification.

q1.title: How do I create an account?
q1.description: Click on the user icon in the header, you will get redirected to sign in/sign up page. Clicking "Create Account" will open the registration form.

q2.title: How can I verify my account?
q2.description: After signing up, you will get a link for your newly created profile, share it with the people you know in the platform to get verified and start contribution

q3.title: What happens if I don’t verify my account?

q4.title: Can I update my information after verification?
q4.description: Yes, but only a limited number of times—and doing so will result in losing all your earned verifications! Basic information, such as birthdate or hometown, rarely changes. However, we understand that mistakes can happen, or certain details, like gender, may need to be updated. For this reason, we allow changes to basic data, but you must accept the consequence of losing your verifications.

q5.title: Why did I lose my verifications after updating my profile?
q5.description: Basic information is rarely changed, as it serves as the foundation for targeting poll audiences. Since our system relies on this data, frequent changes may signal an attempt to manipulate poll results. To maintain trust and accuracy, our algorithms automatically revoke verifications when users modify their basic details.

q6.title: How can I verify someone I know?
q6.description: Ask them to register and provide their profile link

q7.title: What happens if I verify a fake profile?
q7.description: If a profile is later detected as fake, both the fraudulent user and their verifiers will be listed on the Fraudsters Page for transparency.

q8.title: What does "verification" actually mean
q8.description: Verification on our platform confirms that you are Syrian and that the information you provided is accurate. While the platform is intended exclusively for Syrians, the website itself is public and multilingual, allowing anyone to access and complete the registration form. After signing up, you will receive a profile link displaying your basic details. Others can view your profile and verify your identity to confirm that you are indeed Syrian and that the information you entered is correct.

q1.title: How do you protect my data?
q1.description: We are committed to implementing industry-standard security practices. This includes, but is not limited to, isolating data storage from application servers, applying encryption whenever possible, and adhering to best practices for authentication and authorization.

q2.title: Can other users see my personal information?
q2.description: Yes and no. Your public profile displays certain information, including your name, surname, gender, hometown, country of residence, ethnicity, and any social media links you have added to your account.

q3.title: How can I report a fake profile or suspicious activity?
q3.description: Currently, feel free to contact us for that purpose. Developing this feature and integrating it in our fake profiles detection algorithm is in our roadmap.

q4.title: What happens to fake profiles?
q4.description: They get listed on the "fraudsters" page. In some rare cases, we may also investigate behind their verifiers and suspend their accounts as well.

q5.title: What is the Fraudsters Page?
q5.description: The Fraudsters Page is a public list of fake profiles and -sometimes- the users who verified them, helping maintain transparency and accountability.

q1.title: How do I create a poll?
q1.description: Go to the Polls section, click Create Poll, enter your question and options, and select voting preferences before submitting.

q2.title: Who can vote in my polls?
q2.description: By default, all verified users can vote. However, you can customize the audience based on gender, location, and other criteria.

q3.title: Can I edit a poll after submitting it?
q3.description: No, to maintain fairness and prevent manipulation, polls cannot be edited once they are live.

q4.title: How do I see the results of a poll?
q4.description: You can view results in the My Polls section after voting ends. The system provides detailed statistics on participation.

q5.title: What happens if my poll gets reported?
q5.description: Reported polls are reviewed by our team. If found inappropriate, they may be removed, and repeated violations could lead to account suspension.

q6.description: The poll results on e-syrians represent the opinions of users who have registered and verified their identity on the platform. While we work hard to ensure the integrity of our polls, it's essential to understand that they reflect the views of verified participants from the Syrian community. Our algorithms and verification processes are designed to ensure the results are as accurate and trustworthy as possible. Originally, e-syrians was envisioned as a blockchain-based platform to further enhance trust and transparency. However, due to legal and technical constraints, this feature is not currently feasible for Syrians.
q6.title: Can we trust the poll results to represent the Syrian point of view?

q1.title: How can I donate to support the platform?
q1.description: You can donate via our Donate page, where we accept bitcoin transactions.

q2.title: Where does my donation go?
q2.description: Donations help cover platform maintenance, security improvements, and the development of new features. Please note that donation is a voluntary act and does not affect your account status or access to any extra platform features.

after-expiration.title: After expiration
after-expiration.description: Results only revealed after poll ends, designed to reduce manipulation

after-voting.title: Visible after voting
after-voting.description: Users must vote before seeing results, best for opinion-sensitive polls

before-voting.description: Results are always visible, best for informal polls
before-voting.title: Always visible

contributors.title: Meet the contributors
contributors.subtitle: The people whose code powers this platform. Thanks to everyone who's pitched in.

what_happens_next.title: What happens next?
what_happens_next.subtitle: From a spark of an idea to a shipped feature — here's the path your suggestion takes.

submit.title: Submit your idea
submit.body: Share a clear, focused proposal. It goes live for the whole community to see.

vote.title: Community votes
vote.body: Members upvote or downvote. Traction is how we know what matters most.

pick_up.title: Maintainers pick it up
pick_up.body: Ideas that gain traction get turned into a technical plan by one of the maintainers.

ship.title: We build and ship
ship.body: Follow the timeline on each idea: Coded, Tested, Shipped — all visible to everyone.

create.title: Suggest a feature
create.description: Tell us what you want to see next. Clear, focused ideas get the most traction.
create.account_unverified_alert: Verify your account to submit a feature request.
create.success: Thanks — your idea has been submitted.

title.label: Title
